careDirectorOrch.name: Care Director Orchestrator
careDirectorOrch.purpose: Master orchestrator for the Director of Care — provides strategic operational visibility and orchestrates sub-agents (Ops Analytics, Volume Driver, VoC, Workforce Planning) to drive reporting, focus groups, and operational improvement.
careDirectorOrch.tasks: Aggregate strategic insights across all care operations, orchestrate analytics and VoC sub-agents, generate executive briefings, identify cross-functional improvement opportunities, coordinate workforce planning with capacity models, surface root causes for leadership action.
careDirectorOrch.triggers: Daily performance review, weekly executive briefing, monthly business review, strategic planning cycle.
careDirectorOrch.systems: BI/analytics, CRM, WFM, telephony/ACD, QA, survey platform, social listening, HR/finance.
careDirectorOrch.keyData: All sub-agent outputs, contact center KPIs, VoC insights, workforce forecasts, vendor performance, budget data.
careDirectorOrch.kpis: Insight-to-action time, strategic initiative success rate, executive reporting quality, cross-functional issue resolution.
careDirectorOrch.hitl: Assistive — orchestrates strategic sub-agents for Director oversight

opsAnalytics.name: Operations Analytics Agent
opsAnalytics.purpose: Real-time and trending view of contact center performance for Director decision-making.
opsAnalytics.tasks: Aggregate KPIs (CSAT, NPS, FCR, AHT, cost-per-contact), identify trends/anomalies, generate exec dashboards.
opsAnalytics.triggers: Daily review, weekly briefing, monthly business review, KPI breach.
opsAnalytics.keyData: Contact volumes, resolution rates, CSAT/NPS, AHT by queue, cost-per-contact, vendor SLA.
opsAnalytics.kpis: Dashboard accuracy, insight-to-action time, anomaly detection rate.

volumeDriver.name: Volume Driver Analysis Agent
volumeDriver.purpose: Identify why customers contact the center and surface systemic issues.
volumeDriver.tasks: Classify contact reasons, correlate spikes to events, quantify avoidable contacts.
volumeDriver.systems: Transcript analytics, CRM, billing logs, network incidents.
volumeDriver.keyData: Contact reason taxonomy, volume by reason, repeat-contact patterns.
volumeDriver.kpis: Avoidable contact rate, root-cause accuracy, volume reduction.

voiceOfCustomer.name: Voice of Customer Agent
voiceOfCustomer.purpose: Synthesize feedback from surveys, social, complaints, and focus groups.
voiceOfCustomer.tasks: Aggregate verbatims, cluster themes, identify emerging pain points, track sentiment.
voiceOfCustomer.triggers: Post-survey, focus group, quarterly VoC, sentiment shift.
voiceOfCustomer.systems: Survey platform, NPS, social listening, transcript analytics.
voiceOfCustomer.keyData: Survey responses, NPS verbatims, social mentions, focus group transcripts.
voiceOfCustomer.kpis: Theme identification accuracy, emerging issue lead time.

workforcePlanning.name: Workforce Planning Agent
workforcePlanning.purpose: Support strategic capacity planning and headcount decisions.
workforcePlanning.tasks: Forecast volumes, model staffing scenarios, identify gaps, project automation impact.
workforcePlanning.triggers: Monthly capacity review, annual budget, seasonal planning.
workforcePlanning.keyData: Historical volumes, seasonality, attrition, shrinkage, deflection rates.

networkPerf.name: Network Performance Analytics Agent
networkPerf.purpose: Visibility into how network quality drives tech support demand.
networkPerf.tasks: Correlate network events with contact volume, identify chronic areas, quantify truck-roll drivers.
networkPerf.systems: Network mgmt, outage mgmt, CRM, BI, field dispatch.
networkPerf.keyData: Network alarms, outage history, contact-to-outage correlation, truck-roll rates.
networkPerf.kpis: Correlation accuracy, proactive identification, truck-roll reduction.

techOpsInsights.name: Technical Operations Insights Agent
techOpsInsights.purpose: Understand escalation patterns and optimize tiered support.
techOpsInsights.tasks: Analyze Tier 1/2 flows, identify training gaps, surface repeat failures.
techOpsInsights.systems: CRM, case mgmt, knowledge, QA, LMS.
techOpsInsights.keyData: Escalation rates, repeat-step rates, KB usage.

nearRealtime: Today's escalation rates by issue type

churnAnalytics.name: Churn Analytics & Forecasting Agent
churnAnalytics.purpose: Strategic visibility into churn drivers and retention ROI.
churnAnalytics.tasks: Model churn propensity, identify leading indicators, forecast scenarios.
churnAnalytics.systems: CRM, churn model, retention analytics, finance.
churnAnalytics.keyData: Churn by segment, save acceptance, post-save churn, LTV.
churnAnalytics.kpis: Forecast accuracy, program ROI, early-warning lead time.

retentionProgramPerf.name: Retention Program Performance Agent
retentionProgramPerf.purpose: Evaluate whether retention offers work and where they leak margin.
retentionProgramPerf.tasks: Compare save rate by offer, measure post-save churn, flag leakage.
retentionProgramPerf.triggers: Weekly save review, monthly margin analysis.
retentionProgramPerf.keyData: Save outcomes, discount depth, post-save churn, margin per save.
retentionProgramPerf.kpis: Save rate by offer, margin retention, leakage rate.

billingResolution.name: Billing Resolution Agent
billingResolution.purpose: Help supervisors resolve escalated billing disputes.
billingResolution.tasks: Pull billing history, identify dispute root cause, validate credit eligibility, recommend amount.
billingResolution.triggers: Escalated dispute, credit above threshold, multi-cycle dispute.
billingResolution.systems: CRM, billing, payments, case mgmt, policy rules.
billingResolution.keyData: Full billing history, charges, credits, adjustments, plan history, prior disputes.
billingResolution.kpis: Resolution rate, credit accuracy, policy compliance.

paymentException.name: Payment Exception Agent
paymentException.purpose: Help supervisors handle payment exceptions and hardship cases.
paymentException.tasks: Present payment history, evaluate hardship, recommend plan, assess restoration.
paymentException.triggers: Agent escalation, hardship, service restoration, late-fee waiver.
paymentException.keyData: Balance, payment history, autopay, collections stage, hardship indicators.
paymentException.kpis: Exception resolution rate, delinquency save, compliance.

supervisorQueue.name: Care Supervisor Orchestrator
supervisorQueue.purpose: Master orchestrator for the CC Supervisor — provides real-time floor visibility and orchestrates sub-agents (Billing Resolution, Payment Exception, Interaction QA) to manage escalations, approvals, and coaching.
supervisorQueue.tasks: Monitor queue depth and wait times, orchestrate escalation sub-agents, flag AHT/abandonment spikes, identify reps needing coaching, recommend real-time staffing adjustments, coordinate credit approvals and QA reviews.
supervisorQueue.triggers: Queue threshold breach, AHT spike, abandonment spike, escalation request, adherence violation.
supervisorQueue.systems: WFM, telephony/ACD, QA analytics, CRM, billing, case management.
supervisorQueue.keyData: Queue stats, agent adherence, transcripts, agent performance, sentiment, escalation queue, sub-agent outputs.
supervisorQueue.kpis: Service level, occupancy, queue health, coaching-trigger rate, escalation resolution time.
supervisorQueue.hitl: Assistive — orchestrates day-to-day sub-agents for Supervisor oversight

realtime: Live queue depth by skill group
Live sentiment alerts from active calls

interactionQA.name: Interaction QA Agent
interactionQA.purpose: Auto-score interactions for compliance and quality.
interactionQA.tasks: Summarize calls, identify policy violations, score quality, recommend coaching.
interactionQA.systems: Transcripts, QA platform, CRM, compliance rules.
interactionQA.keyData: Transcripts, policy library, QA rubric, outcomes.
interactionQA.kpis: QA score, violation rate, false-positive rate.

techEscalation.name: Tech Escalation Summary Agent
techEscalation.tasks: Summarize diagnostics, capture symptoms, tag root cause.
techEscalation.triggers: Transfer from care to advanced tech.

techQueuePriority.name: Tech Queue Prioritization Agent
techQueuePriority.purpose: Prioritize tech cases by impact and risk.
techQueuePriority.tasks: Rank by severity, VIP status, churn risk, repeat-failure.
techQueuePriority.systems: Case platform, network events, customer-value model.
techQueuePriority.keyData: Severity, failed contacts, customer value, SLA status.

realtime: Live tech support queue with case metadata

saveOffer.name: Save Offer Recommendation Agent
saveOffer.tasks: Score churn, identify root cause, rank offers, enforce governance.
saveOffer.triggers: Cancel inquiry, port-out, rejected initial offer.
saveOffer.systems: CRM, retention offers, pricing, usage, margin.
saveOffer.keyData: Churn propensity, tenure, complaints, prior offers, discount rules.

batch: Historical save outcomes by offer type

retentionSuperPerf.name: Retention Supervisor Performance Agent
retentionSuperPerf.purpose: Manage save quality across the team.
retentionSuperPerf.tasks: Compare reps on save rate, discount depth, post-save churn.
retentionSuperPerf.keyData: Save outcomes by rep, discounts, downstream churn.

sentimentDefection.name: Sentiment & Defection Risk Agent
sentimentDefection.purpose: Surface likely defectors for proactive intervention.
sentimentDefection.tasks: Monitor negative patterns, score risk, recommend outreach.
sentimentDefection.triggers: Repeated contacts, low CSAT, social complaints.

careCopilot.name: Care Orchestrator
careCopilot.purpose: Master orchestrator supporting the frontline rep — provides customer context and orchestrates 14 sub-agents (Billing, Payment, Plan, Account, Features, Device, Network, Promo, Security, Autopay, Orders, Number Transfer, Self-Service Guide, Warm Transfer) across the interaction.
careCopilot.tasks: Authenticate and retrieve full customer context, classify intent, select and orchestrate the right sub-agent(s), maintain conversation continuity across topic switches, manage multi-intent interactions, suggest next best action, draft responses, auto-populate after-call work, determine escalation to supervisor via Warm Transfer Agent.
careCopilot.systems: CRM, billing, payments, OMS, knowledge base, case notes, routing engine.
careCopilot.keyData: Full account profile, billing summary, product holdings, interaction history, policy/knowledge, escalation thresholds, sub-agent status.
careCopilot.kpis: AHT reduction, FCR, sub-agent orchestration success rate, escalation accuracy, rep adoption.
careCopilot.hitl: Assistive — orchestrates autonomous sub-agents while keeping rep in the loop

careTriage.name: Warm Transfer Agent
careTriage.purpose: Execute warm transfers between agents, channels, and human reps — maintaining full context continuity.
careTriage.tasks: Package interaction context (customer identity, issue summary, steps taken, sentiment), route to target agent or human queue, provide receiving party with complete handoff brief, ensure no information loss on transfer.
careTriage.triggers: Orchestrator determines transfer needed, customer requests supervisor, issue requires different skill group, cross-channel handoff.
careTriage.systems: IVR/chat, CRM, identity verification, case routing engine, telephony/ACD.
careTriage.keyData: Full interaction transcript, customer identity, issue classification, prior agent actions, sentiment score, target routing rules.
careTriage.kpis: Transfer context completeness, repeat-info rate post-transfer, warm transfer success rate, handoff time.

orderStatus.name: Order Status Agent
orderStatus.tasks: Check order stage, shipment, activation, appointment date.
orderStatus.keyData: Order ID, shipping status, activation status.

planAdvisory.name: Plan Advisory Agent
planAdvisory.purpose: Recommend, compare, and execute plan changes based on customer usage patterns and available offers.
planAdvisory.tasks: Analyze current plan vs usage, identify overpaying or underserved scenarios, compare plan options, recommend optimal plan, execute plan change, explain impact on monthly bill, surface multi-line and bundle savings.
planAdvisory.triggers: Customer asks about plan change, usage exceeds plan limits, proactive optimization opportunity, 'am I on the best plan?' inquiry.
planAdvisory.systems: CRM, product catalog, pricing engine, usage analytics, promotion rules.
planAdvisory.keyData: Current plan details, 30/60/90-day usage patterns, available plans and pricing, promo eligibility, household lines.
planAdvisory.kpis: Plan change completion rate, ARPU impact, customer satisfaction post-change, containment rate.
planAdvisory.hitl: Fully autonomous for standard changes; approval-based for downgrades with revenue impact

accountMgmt.name: Account Management Agent
accountMgmt.purpose: Handle account profile changes — address, name, authorized users, contact preferences, and billing responsibility transfers.
accountMgmt.tasks: Validate identity, update mailing/service address, process name change, add/remove authorized users, update contact preferences, initiate transfer of billing responsibility, confirm changes and explain downstream impacts.
accountMgmt.triggers: Customer requests account change, address update, authorized user modification, transfer of billing.
accountMgmt.systems: CRM, identity verification, address validation (USPS), billing system, tax jurisdiction lookup.
accountMgmt.keyData: Account profile, identity verification status, address validation, authorized user list, billing configuration.
accountMgmt.kpis: Account change completion rate, identity verification success, error rate on changes, containment rate.
accountMgmt.hitl: Fully autonomous for standard changes; approval-based for billing responsibility transfers

featureAddon.name: Feature & Add-On Agent
featureAddon.purpose: Add, remove, or modify account features — international roaming, hotspot, device insurance, call blocking, voicemail, content subscriptions.
featureAddon.tasks: Show current features, explain available add-ons and pricing, add/remove features, activate international roaming with travel dates, manage device protection plans, set up voicemail, toggle content subscriptions (Netflix, Apple TV+).
featureAddon.triggers: Feature inquiry, international travel prep, insurance request, voicemail setup, subscription management.
featureAddon.systems: CRM, product catalog, feature provisioning, partner APIs (streaming services), billing.
featureAddon.keyData: Current features and add-ons, available features with pricing, device compatibility, partner subscription status.
featureAddon.kpis: Feature change completion rate, feature attach rate, containment rate, ARPU impact.

deviceSupport.name: Device Support Agent
deviceSupport.purpose: Answer basic device how-to questions, setup guidance, settings navigation, and trade-in eligibility — not deep troubleshooting.
deviceSupport.tasks: Guide device setup and data transfer, navigate device settings, answer common device FAQ, check trade-in eligibility and value, verify device compatibility, send self-service deep links for app-based resolution.
deviceSupport.triggers: 'How do I...?' device questions, new device setup help, trade-in inquiry, device compatibility check.
deviceSupport.systems: CRM, device database, knowledge base, trade-in valuation API, deep link generator.
deviceSupport.keyData: Device model and OS version, device-specific guides, trade-in values, compatibility matrix.
deviceSupport.kpis: Resolution rate, deflection to self-service, escalation rate to Tier 2, containment rate.

realtime: Customer device model, IMEI, OS version

networkTriage.name: Network & Coverage Agent
networkTriage.purpose: Handle connectivity complaints, check for known outages, run remote diagnostics, and walk through standard reset steps before escalating.
networkTriage.tasks: Check for active outages at customer's service address, run remote network diagnostics, guide through reset/reprovision steps, check coverage quality at customer locations, set expectations for known issues, escalate to Tier 2 via Warm Transfer if unresolved.
networkTriage.triggers: 'My service is down,' slow data complaint, dropped calls, coverage question, connectivity issue.
networkTriage.systems: Outage management, network assurance, CRM, remote diagnostics, coverage maps.
networkTriage.keyData: Customer service address, serving cell site status, active outage tickets, signal quality data, coverage maps.
networkTriage.kpis: First-contact resolution for network issues, outage containment rate, Tier 2 escalation rate, truck-roll avoidance.
networkTriage.hitl: Hybrid — autonomous for known outages, assistive for ambiguous issues

realtime: Active outage status at customer's area

promoLoyalty.name: Promotion & Loyalty Agent
promoLoyalty.purpose: Surface available promotions, validate eligibility, explain current discounts, and handle 'am I getting the best deal?' inquiries.
promoLoyalty.tasks: Review customer's current discounts and credits, check eligibility for new promotions, compare current deal vs available offers, apply or stack eligible promotions, explain promo terms and duration, surface loyalty rewards and tenure-based benefits.
promoLoyalty.triggers: 'Am I getting the best deal?', promo inquiry, loyalty benefit question, competitor mention, price sensitivity signal.
promoLoyalty.systems: CRM, promotion engine, eligibility rules, loyalty platform, pricing, competitor intelligence.
promoLoyalty.keyData: Current discounts and credits, available promotions, eligibility criteria, loyalty tier and points, tenure, competitor offers.
promoLoyalty.kpis: Promo application rate, save rate from promo offers, ARPU impact, containment rate.
promoLoyalty.hitl: Approval-based for stacking multiple promotions or exceeding discount thresholds

accountSecurity.name: Account Security Agent
accountSecurity.purpose: Handle PIN/passcode reset, SIM lock, fraud alerts, and account takeover response with elevated identity verification.
accountSecurity.tasks: Enforce enhanced multi-factor authentication, process PIN/passcode reset, lock/unlock SIM, activate SIM swap protection, respond to fraud alerts, freeze account on suspected takeover, guide through identity recovery, log security events for audit.
accountSecurity.triggers: PIN reset request, SIM lock request, fraud alert, suspicious activity detected, account takeover report, SIM swap attempt.
accountSecurity.systems: CRM, identity verification (MFA), SIM management, fraud detection, security audit log.
accountSecurity.keyData: Account identity markers, authentication history, SIM status, recent security events, fraud risk score.
accountSecurity.kpis: Authentication success rate, fraud prevention rate, false-positive rate, account recovery time, compliance with FCC SIM swap rules.
accountSecurity.hitl: Approval-based — requires enhanced identity verification before any security action

autopayMgmt.name: Autopay & Payment Method Agent
autopayMgmt.purpose: Enroll/unenroll autopay, update payment methods, troubleshoot failed autopay charges, and explain autopay discount eligibility.
autopayMgmt.tasks: Set up autopay enrollment, update credit card/debit card/bank account on file, troubleshoot declined autopay payments, explain autopay discount ($5-10/line), process payment method changes, confirm next autopay date and amount.
autopayMgmt.triggers: Autopay setup request, payment method update, failed autopay notification, autopay discount inquiry.
autopayMgmt.systems: Billing, payment gateway, autopay management, CRM.
autopayMgmt.keyData: Current payment method on file, autopay status, next payment date/amount, failed payment codes, autopay discount eligibility.
autopayMgmt.kpis: Autopay enrollment rate, payment method update success, failed payment recovery rate, containment rate.

numberTransfer.name: Number Transfer Agent
numberTransfer.purpose: Manage port-in requests, port-out processing, and number change requests with carrier interop validation.
numberTransfer.tasks: Guide customer through port-in requirements (account number, PIN from old carrier), validate number portability, initiate port-in request, track port status, handle port-out requests, process number changes, troubleshoot failed ports.
numberTransfer.triggers: Port-in request, port-out inquiry, number change request, failed port troubleshooting.
numberTransfer.systems: Number portability clearinghouse, CRM, activation system, carrier interop APIs.
numberTransfer.keyData: Number to port, donor carrier, account credentials from old carrier, port-in status, FOC date.
numberTransfer.kpis: Port completion rate, port cycle time, failed port rate, containment rate.
numberTransfer.hitl: Fully autonomous for standard ports; approval-based for complex multi-line ports

selfServiceGuide.name: Self-Service Guide Agent
selfServiceGuide.purpose: Walk customers through how to accomplish tasks in the carrier app or website, sending deep links to reduce future call volume.
selfServiceGuide.tasks: Identify what the customer is trying to do, provide step-by-step app/website navigation guidance, send deep links directly to the relevant app screen, educate on self-service capabilities, reduce callback likelihood.
selfServiceGuide.triggers: 'How do I do this in the app?', customer unaware of self-service option, task that can be done digitally.
selfServiceGuide.systems: CRM, app/website navigation guides, deep link generator, knowledge base.
selfServiceGuide.keyData: Customer's device type (iOS/Android), app version, available self-service features, deep link catalog.
selfServiceGuide.kpis: Self-service deflection rate, deep link click-through rate, callback reduction, containment rate.

channelResponse.name: Channel Response Agent
channelResponse.tasks: Compose replies, adapt tone, insert status, recommend escalation.
channelResponse.keyData: Channel history, account status, response patterns.

advTechCopilot.name: Tech Support Orchestrator
advTechCopilot.purpose: Master orchestrator for advanced tech reps — provides diagnostic context and orchestrates sub-agents (Outage & Health, Device Troubleshooting) across complex technical interactions.
advTechCopilot.tasks: Retrieve device/network context, orchestrate diagnostic sub-agents, suggest root-cause hypotheses, recommend next diagnostic step, generate customer-safe explanations, auto-summarize case notes, determine escalation path.
advTechCopilot.systems: Diagnostics, CRM, knowledge base, incident platform, network assurance, device management.
advTechCopilot.keyData: Full diagnostic context, known incidents, device history, network performance, sub-agent results.
advTechCopilot.kpis: Resolution quality, AHT, sub-agent orchestration rate, transfer-back rate, rep adoption.
advTechCopilot.hitl: Assistive — orchestrates diagnostic sub-agents with rep oversight

realtime: Active network alarms at serving site

outageHealth.name: Outage & Service Health Agent
outageHealth.tasks: Identify outage, correlate data, provide ETA, suppress truck-roll.
outageHealth.systems: Outage mgmt, network assurance, CRM, incidents.
outageHealth.keyData: Outage map, service address, alarms, maintenance windows.

realtime: Active outage tickets with affected area polygons

deviceTroubleshoot.name: Device Troubleshooting Agent
deviceTroubleshoot.tasks: Run troubleshooting tree, identify issue, suggest fixes.
deviceTroubleshoot.triggers: Device issue, Wi-Fi complaint, activation failure.
deviceTroubleshoot.systems: Device mgmt, network diagnostics, CRM, knowledge.
deviceTroubleshoot.keyData: Device model, firmware, diagnostics, signal quality.

retentionCopilot.name: Retention Orchestrator
retentionCopilot.purpose: Master orchestrator for retention reps — provides churn context and orchestrates sub-agents (Save Offer, Sentiment & Defection) to guide save conversations.
retentionCopilot.tasks: Retrieve customer churn context, orchestrate save offer recommendation, surface churn reason summary, recommend save script path, show eligible offers with margin impact, provide objection handling guidance, flag when to escalate to supervisor.
retentionCopilot.systems: CRM, retention offer engine, knowledge base, policy rules, churn model.
retentionCopilot.keyData: Full churn context, prior interactions, eligible offers, product economics, escalation thresholds, sub-agent outputs.
retentionCopilot.kpis: Save conversion, time-to-offer, discount discipline, orchestration success rate, supervisor escalation accuracy.
retentionCopilot.hitl: Assistive — orchestrates retention sub-agents with rep oversight

realtime: Current call context & stated cancel reason

retailCopilot.name: Retail Orchestrator
retailCopilot.purpose: Master orchestrator for retail associates — provides customer context and orchestrates sub-agents (Accessory & Bundle, Promo Eligibility) during in-store sales.
retailCopilot.tasks: Retrieve customer account and eligibility, orchestrate plan recommendation and promo validation, check upgrade eligibility, recommend plans/bundles, explain trade-in, prepare quote/order, summarize disclosures.
retailCopilot.systems: CRM, product catalog, pricing/promotions, eligibility engine, OMS, POS.
retailCopilot.keyData: Account profile, line eligibility, device inventory, promo rules, financing rules, sub-agent outputs.
retailCopilot.kpis: Conversion, upsell rate, order accuracy, basket value, disclosure compliance, orchestration rate.
retailCopilot.hitl: Assistive — orchestrates sales sub-agents with associate oversight

accessoryBundle.name: Accessory & Bundle Agent
accessoryBundle.keyData: Chosen device, household products, promo eligibility.

digitalConversion.name: Digital Conversion Optimization Agent
digitalConversion.tasks: Identify drop-offs, recommend content/offers, trigger nudges.

planRecommendation.name: Plan Recommendation Agent
planRecommendation.purpose: Match users to the right plan online.
planRecommendation.tasks: Infer needs, compare plans, surface bundles.

promoEligibility.name: Promo Eligibility Agent
promoEligibility.systems: Pricing, promo engine, identity, order validation.
promoEligibility.keyData: Promo terms, line status, trade-in rules.

checkoutSupport.name: Checkout Support Agent
checkoutSupport.tasks: Answer checkout questions, recover failed steps.
checkoutSupport.keyData: Cart, financing, shipping options, error codes.

digitalFallout.name: Digital Order Fallout Agent
digitalFallout.tasks: Diagnose fallout, request missing info, resubmit.

callCoaching.name: Call Coaching & Objection Agent
callCoaching.tasks: Live prompts, objection handling, post-call coaching.
callCoaching.keyData: Live transcript, customer profile, offer rules.

telesalesPerf.name: Telesales Performance Agent
telesalesPerf.purpose: Help supervisors manage conversion and quality.
telesalesPerf.tasks: Rank reps, flag leakage, identify coaching needs.

telesalesCopilot.name: Telesales Orchestrator
telesalesCopilot.purpose: Master orchestrator for telesales reps — provides customer context and orchestrates sub-agents (Upgrade Eligibility, Cross-sell/Upsell) during phone sales.
telesalesCopilot.tasks: Retrieve customer account and eligibility, orchestrate upgrade and cross-sell recommendations, recommend plans/devices, quote monthly price, handle disclosures, create order.
telesalesCopilot.keyData: Customer/account profile, eligibility, promos, device stock, financing status, sub-agent outputs.
telesalesCopilot.kpis: Quote-to-order conversion, upsell rate, order accuracy, AHT, orchestration rate.
telesalesCopilot.hitl: Assistive — orchestrates sales sub-agents with rep oversight

quoteGovernance.name: Quote & Order Governance Agent
quoteGovernance.tasks: Validate completeness, check compliance, flag risks.

offerPerformance.name: Offer Performance Agent
offerPerformance.tasks: Compare uptake, margin impact, abuse patterns.

channelOptimization.name: Channel Optimization Agent
channelOptimization.purpose: Compare channel performance and reallocate focus.

salesDirectorOrch.name: Sales Director Orchestrator
salesDirectorOrch.purpose: Master orchestrator for the CRO/VP level — provides strategic sales visibility and orchestrates sub-agents (Sales Forecast, Competitive Intel, RevOps) to drive revenue strategy.
salesDirectorOrch.tasks: Aggregate pipeline and revenue data across all channels, orchestrate forecasting and competitive sub-agents, generate executive sales briefings, identify cross-channel optimization opportunities.
salesDirectorOrch.triggers: Weekly pipeline review, monthly business review, quarterly planning, revenue variance alert.
salesDirectorOrch.systems: CRM, BI/analytics, pipeline management, competitive intel, finance.
salesDirectorOrch.keyData: Pipeline by channel, conversion rates, revenue forecasts, competitive landscape, market share.
salesDirectorOrch.kpis: Forecast accuracy, pipeline health, revenue attainment, cross-channel alignment.

salesSupervisorOrch.name: Sales Supervisor Orchestrator
salesSupervisorOrch.purpose: Master orchestrator for retail/telesales supervisors — provides floor visibility and orchestrates sub-agents (Coaching, Compliance, Knowledge) to manage rep performance.
salesSupervisorOrch.tasks: Monitor rep activity and conversion, orchestrate coaching and enablement sub-agents, flag compliance issues, surface real-time competitive battle cards, manage deal escalations.
salesSupervisorOrch.triggers: Rep performance anomaly, compliance flag, deal escalation, shift review.
salesSupervisorOrch.systems: CRM, QA, telephony, POS, coaching platform, compliance rules.
salesSupervisorOrch.keyData: Rep performance metrics, active deals, compliance status, coaching history.
salesSupervisorOrch.kpis: Rep conversion lift, coaching completion, compliance adherence, deal escalation quality.

leadScoring.name: Lead Scoring & Qualification Agent
leadScoring.purpose: Score inbound leads based on engagement signals, fit criteria, and behavioral data; auto-route qualified leads to the right channel/rep.
leadScoring.tasks: Analyze web/app engagement signals, score leads against ICP criteria, classify by channel fit (retail/digital/telesales), auto-route to appropriate rep queue, flag high-value prospects for priority handling.
leadScoring.triggers: New web inquiry, form submission, chat initiation, app engagement threshold, campaign response.
leadScoring.systems: CRM, CDP, web analytics, marketing automation, lead routing engine.
leadScoring.keyData: Engagement score, demographic fit, behavioral signals, campaign source, channel preference.
leadScoring.kpis: Lead-to-opportunity conversion, routing accuracy, time-to-first-contact, lead quality score.

salesForecast.name: Sales Forecasting & Pipeline Agent
salesForecast.purpose: Analyze deal characteristics, historical close rates, and seasonality to produce rolling forecasts and flag at-risk pipeline.
salesForecast.tasks: Model pipeline by stage/channel/product, forecast weekly/monthly/quarterly revenue, flag deals at risk of slipping, identify seasonality patterns, recommend pipeline actions.
salesForecast.triggers: Weekly forecast cycle, deal stage change, pipeline variance alert, quarter-end planning.
salesForecast.systems: CRM, pipeline analytics, finance, historical sales data.
salesForecast.keyData: Pipeline by stage, deal velocity, historical close rates, seasonal patterns, channel mix.
salesForecast.kpis: Forecast accuracy, pipeline coverage ratio, deal velocity, at-risk identification rate.

competitiveIntel.name: Competitive Intelligence Agent
competitiveIntel.purpose: Monitor competitor pricing, promotions, plan changes, and sentiment; generate real-time battle cards for frontline reps.
competitiveIntel.tasks: Track competitor plan/pricing changes, monitor promotional offers, analyze competitive sentiment, generate battle cards, alert on significant competitive moves, benchmark market positioning.
competitiveIntel.triggers: Competitor pricing change, new competitor promotion, weekly competitive review, rep request.
competitiveIntel.systems: Competitive intel platform, web scraping, social listening, CRM, knowledge base.
competitiveIntel.keyData: Competitor plans and pricing, promotional calendars, market share data, customer win/loss reasons.
competitiveIntel.kpis: Battle card usage by reps, competitive win rate, time-to-detect competitor changes.

customerOnboarding.name: Customer Onboarding Agent
customerOnboarding.purpose: Automate post-sale activation journey: device setup, plan walkthrough, first-bill explanation, feature adoption nudges.
customerOnboarding.tasks: Guide device setup and data transfer, explain plan features and included perks, preview first bill to prevent bill shock, prompt app download and autopay enrollment, trigger welcome journey communications, monitor activation success.
customerOnboarding.triggers: New activation, device purchase, plan change, first-bill generation.
customerOnboarding.systems: CRM, billing, activation, marketing automation, carrier app.
customerOnboarding.keyData: Activation status, device type, plan details, first-bill preview, feature adoption status.
customerOnboarding.kpis: Activation success rate, first-bill call-in rate, app adoption rate, 30-day churn rate, feature activation rate.

renewalRetention.name: Renewal & Lifecycle Agent
renewalRetention.purpose: Proactively identify contracts nearing expiration, model churn risk at renewal, and generate personalized retention/upgrade offers.
renewalRetention.tasks: Track device payment completion dates, identify renewal windows, score churn risk at renewal, generate personalized upgrade/retention offers, trigger proactive outreach, measure renewal conversion.
renewalRetention.triggers: Device payment 80% complete, contract anniversary, churn risk spike at renewal window.
renewalRetention.systems: CRM, billing, device lifecycle, churn model, offer engine, marketing automation.
renewalRetention.keyData: Device payment status, contract dates, renewal eligibility, churn propensity at renewal, offer history.
renewalRetention.kpis: Renewal conversion rate, proactive outreach success, churn at renewal, ARPU post-renewal.
renewalRetention.hitl: Hybrid — autonomous for standard renewals, approval-based for high-value retention offers

partnerDealer.name: Partner & Dealer Management Agent
partnerDealer.purpose: Manage authorized dealer/retailer performance, distribute leads, track compliance, and optimize co-op marketing spend.
partnerDealer.tasks: Distribute leads to dealers by territory and performance, monitor dealer sales compliance, track co-op/MDF spend and ROI, flag dealer quality issues, benchmark dealer vs corporate store performance.
partnerDealer.triggers: New lead for dealer territory, dealer compliance review, co-op claim submission, quarterly performance review.
partnerDealer.systems: Partner portal, CRM, lead routing, compliance tracking, finance/co-op system.
partnerDealer.keyData: Dealer performance metrics, lead distribution, compliance scores, co-op spend and ROI, territory coverage.
partnerDealer.kpis: Dealer conversion rate, lead response time, compliance score, co-op ROI, dealer satisfaction.

inventoryAllocation.name: Inventory & Allocation Agent
inventoryAllocation.purpose: Match device inventory to demand forecasts, flag out-of-stock risks, and optimize allocation across stores and warehouses.
inventoryAllocation.tasks: Forecast device demand by SKU/location, identify stockout risks, recommend reallocation between stores, flag overstock situations, align inventory with promotional campaigns.
inventoryAllocation.triggers: Stockout alert, new device launch, promotional campaign, weekly allocation cycle.
inventoryAllocation.systems: Inventory management, POS, demand forecasting, supply chain, CRM.
inventoryAllocation.keyData: Device inventory by location/SKU, demand forecasts, sales velocity, promotional calendar, supply pipeline.
inventoryAllocation.kpis: Stockout rate, inventory turns, lost sales from OOS, allocation accuracy.

revOps.name: RevOps Orchestrator
revOps.purpose: Unify pipeline, forecasting, and revenue data across retail/digital/telesales/dealer channels; ensure funnel alignment and data hygiene.
revOps.tasks: Reconcile pipeline data across channels, enforce consistent stage definitions, identify funnel leakage points, generate unified revenue reports, coordinate cross-channel handoffs, maintain data hygiene.
revOps.triggers: Pipeline discrepancy detected, cross-channel handoff, weekly revenue review, data quality alert.
revOps.systems: CRM, BI, pipeline analytics, finance, all channel systems.
revOps.keyData: Unified pipeline, channel conversion rates, funnel stage alignment, data quality scores, revenue attribution.
revOps.kpis: Pipeline accuracy, cross-channel conversion, data hygiene score, revenue forecast variance.

complianceReg.name: Compliance & Regulatory Agent
complianceReg.purpose: Monitor agent and rep actions for TCPA, FCC, and state regulatory compliance; flag violations and ensure disclosures.
complianceReg.tasks: Audit outbound communications for TCPA compliance, verify mandatory disclosures in sales transactions, monitor consent management, flag potential regulatory violations, generate compliance reports.
complianceReg.triggers: Outbound campaign launch, sales transaction, consent status change, regulatory audit, violation detection.
complianceReg.systems: Compliance platform, CRM, marketing automation, consent management, telephony.
complianceReg.keyData: Consent records, disclosure completion, TCPA opt-in status, regulatory requirements by state, violation history.
complianceReg.kpis: Compliance rate, violation count, disclosure completion rate, audit pass rate.
complianceReg.hitl: Approval-based — flags violations for human review

knowledgeMgmt.name: Knowledge Management Agent
knowledgeMgmt.purpose: Surface relevant knowledge articles, product specs, competitive battle cards, and policy docs to reps in real-time during interactions.
knowledgeMgmt.tasks: Index and rank knowledge content, surface contextually relevant articles during live interactions, identify knowledge gaps from failed searches, recommend content updates, track article effectiveness.
knowledgeMgmt.triggers: Live rep interaction, knowledge search, content gap detected, new product/policy launch.
knowledgeMgmt.systems: Knowledge base, CRM, search engine, content management, training platform.
knowledgeMgmt.keyData: Knowledge articles, product specs, policy documents, battle cards, search logs, content effectiveness.
knowledgeMgmt.kpis: Article surfacing accuracy, search success rate, knowledge gap identification, content freshness.

realtime: Contextual search based on live interaction

salesCoach.name: Sales Enablement & Coaching Agent
salesCoach.purpose: AI role-play for reps: simulate customer objections, practice pitches, provide deal-specific coaching per opportunity stage.
salesCoach.tasks: Run objection handling simulations, score rep pitch quality, provide deal-specific coaching recommendations, identify skill gaps, generate personalized learning paths, track coaching completion.
salesCoach.triggers: New rep onboarding, deal stage progression, coaching session request, skill gap identified.
salesCoach.systems: Coaching platform, CRM, training/LMS, call recording, QA analytics.
salesCoach.keyData: Rep skill assessments, deal context, objection library, best-practice scripts, coaching history.
salesCoach.kpis: Rep skill improvement, coaching completion rate, time-to-productivity for new hires, conversion lift post-coaching.

abandonedCart.name: Cart Recovery Agent
abandonedCart.purpose: Trigger personalized multi-touch recovery sequences when customers abandon digital carts or drop out of checkout.
abandonedCart.tasks: Detect cart abandonment, determine abandonment reason, send personalized recovery messages (email/SMS/push), offer incentives if appropriate, track recovery conversion, hand off to live agent if needed.
abandonedCart.triggers: Cart abandoned >30 minutes, checkout step failure, payment decline, session exit from checkout.
abandonedCart.systems: Commerce platform, marketing automation, CRM, payments, SMS/email.
abandonedCart.keyData: Cart contents, abandonment step, customer profile, prior purchase history, recovery offer eligibility.
abandonedCart.kpis: Cart recovery rate, recovery revenue, time-to-recovery, channel effectiveness.
abandonedCart.hitl: Fully autonomous for standard recovery; approval-based for discount incentives

brandPerformance.name: Brand Performance Agent
brandPerformance.purpose: Track brand health and campaign impact.
brandPerformance.tasks: Monitor awareness/favorability, track social sentiment, analyze competitive SOV.
brandPerformance.systems: Brand tracking, social listening, surveys, competitive intel.
brandPerformance.keyData: Awareness, favorability, NPS, social sentiment, SOV.

campaignPerformance.name: Campaign Performance Agent
campaignPerformance.tasks: Aggregate metrics, A/B test creative, recommend budget shifts.
campaignPerformance.keyData: Impressions, reach, CTR, CPM, CPA, creative variants.

mediaMix.name: Media Mix Optimization Agent
mediaMix.tasks: Run MMM, recommend budget shifts, forecast volume.
mediaMix.keyData: Spend by channel, attribution, conversions, CPAs.

acquisitionCampaign.name: Acquisition Campaign Agent
acquisitionCampaign.tasks: Adjust bids, pause underperformers, scale winners.
acquisitionCampaign.systems: Google Ads, Meta Ads, DSP, analytics.

contentPerformance.name: Content & SEO Agent
contentPerformance.tasks: Track rankings, identify gaps, analyze competitor SEO.

conversionOptimization.name: Conversion Optimization Agent
conversionOptimization.tasks: Identify drop-offs, recommend A/B tests, personalize pages.
conversionOptimization.triggers: Conversion drop, new campaign, quarterly CRO.
conversionOptimization.systems: A/B testing, web analytics, CMS, CDP.
conversionOptimization.keyData: Funnel metrics, test results, segment performance.

attributionAnalytics.name: Marketing Attribution Agent
attributionAnalytics.tasks: Run MTA models, compare MTA vs MMM, identify high-value paths.
attributionAnalytics.systems: Attribution platform, ad platforms, CRM, data warehouse.
attributionAnalytics.keyData: Touchpoint data, conversion paths, channel interactions.

journeyOrchestration.name: Journey Orchestration Agent
journeyOrchestration.tasks: Trigger right message at right time, select channel, personalize, manage frequency.
journeyOrchestration.triggers: Customer events (activation, first bill, churn signal).
journeyOrchestration.keyData: Lifecycle stage, engagement history, preferences, event triggers.
journeyOrchestration.kpis: Open/click rates, journey completion, opt-out rate.

audienceSegmentation.name: Audience Segmentation Agent
audienceSegmentation.purpose: Build and maintain dynamic customer segments.
audienceSegmentation.tasks: Create segments, identify micro-segments, recommend lookalikes.
audienceSegmentation.systems: CDP, CRM, data warehouse, marketing automation.

loyaltyEngagement.name: Loyalty Engagement Agent
loyaltyEngagement.tasks: Analyze redemption, recommend personalized offers, identify disengaged.
loyaltyEngagement.keyData: Redemption data, engagement frequency, partner offers.
loyaltyEngagement.kpis: Engagement rate, redemption rate, program ROI.

nextBestAction.name: Next-Best-Action Agent
nextBestAction.purpose: Determine optimal next communication or offer.
nextBestAction.tasks: Score propensity, select offer, determine channel/time, enforce rules.
nextBestAction.systems: Decision engine, CRM, CDP, marketing automation.
nextBestAction.keyData: Propensity scores, offer eligibility, interaction history, preferences.

realtime: Customer context (current interaction or trigger event)

brandOrch.name: Brand Orchestrator
brandOrch.purpose: Master orchestrator for the VP Brand & Communications — orchestrates sub-agents (Brand Performance, Campaign, Media Mix, Content, Social, Reputation) for integrated brand management.
brandOrch.tasks: Coordinate brand campaigns, orchestrate creative and media sub-agents, maintain brand consistency across channels, surface brand health insights for leadership.
brandOrch.triggers: Campaign launch, brand health review, crisis alert, quarterly planning.
brandOrch.systems: Brand tracking, ad platforms, social listening, creative tools, PR.
brandOrch.keyData: Brand health metrics, campaign performance, social sentiment, competitive SOV, creative assets.
brandOrch.kpis: Brand lift, campaign ROI, cross-channel brand consistency, crisis response time.

contentCreative.name: Content Generation Agent
contentCreative.purpose: Generate ad copy, email variants, social posts, and landing pages at scale while maintaining brand voice.
contentCreative.tasks: Produce multi-variant ad copy, generate email subject lines and body content, create social media posts by platform, draft landing page copy, adapt content for segments, enforce brand voice guidelines.
contentCreative.triggers: Campaign brief, content calendar deadline, A/B test variant needed, new product/promo launch.
contentCreative.systems: CMS, creative tools, brand guidelines, marketing automation, DAM.
contentCreative.keyData: Brand voice guidelines, campaign brief, audience segments, prior high-performing content, product details.
contentCreative.kpis: Content production velocity, engagement rates, brand voice compliance, variant win rate.

socialMedia.name: Social Media Management Agent
socialMedia.purpose: Schedule posts, monitor engagement, respond to comments, identify trending conversations, and manage community across platforms.
socialMedia.tasks: Schedule and publish social content, monitor brand mentions and engagement, draft community responses, identify trending topics, flag crisis signals, track influencer activity, report on social KPIs.
socialMedia.triggers: Scheduled post, brand mention spike, negative sentiment alert, trending topic, community question.
socialMedia.systems: Social management platform, CRM, content library, social listening, moderation tools.
socialMedia.keyData: Social calendar, engagement metrics, brand mentions, community sentiment, trending topics, influencer data.
socialMedia.kpis: Engagement rate, response time, sentiment trend, community growth, crisis detection speed.
socialMedia.hitl: Approval-based for public responses; autonomous for monitoring and scheduling

reputationReview.name: Reputation & Review Agent
reputationReview.purpose: Monitor reviews across Google, Yelp, app stores; generate response drafts; alert on sentiment spikes; track NPS trends.
reputationReview.tasks: Aggregate reviews from all platforms, classify sentiment and topics, generate response drafts, alert on negative review spikes, track app store rating trends, identify store-level reputation issues.
reputationReview.triggers: New review, rating drop, sentiment spike, weekly reputation review.
reputationReview.systems: Review monitoring platform, CRM, store data, app store APIs, social listening.
reputationReview.keyData: Reviews by platform, star ratings, sentiment classification, store-level ratings, app store metrics.
reputationReview.kpis: Average rating, response rate, response time, sentiment trend, rating improvement.

digitalMktOrch.name: Digital Marketing Orchestrator
digitalMktOrch.purpose: Master orchestrator for VP Digital Marketing — orchestrates sub-agents (Acquisition, SEO, Conversion, Attribution, Competitive Monitoring, A/B Testing) for integrated digital growth.
digitalMktOrch.tasks: Coordinate digital acquisition strategy, orchestrate channel-specific sub-agents, optimize budget allocation across digital channels, surface performance insights.
digitalMktOrch.triggers: Daily performance review, budget reallocation, channel anomaly, quarterly planning.
digitalMktOrch.systems: Ad platforms, SEO tools, web analytics, attribution, A/B testing.
digitalMktOrch.keyData: Digital CPA by channel, conversion funnels, SEO rankings, attribution paths, test results.
digitalMktOrch.kpis: Digital CPA, ROAS, organic traffic growth, conversion rate, test velocity.

competitiveMonitor.name: Competitive Monitoring Agent
competitiveMonitor.purpose: Track competitor ad creative, messaging changes, pricing promotions, and share-of-voice shifts for marketing counter-response.
competitiveMonitor.tasks: Monitor competitor advertising activity, detect messaging/positioning changes, track promotional cadence, analyze share of voice shifts, alert on significant competitive moves, recommend counter-campaign actions.
competitiveMonitor.triggers: Competitor campaign launch, SOV shift, pricing change, weekly competitive review.
competitiveMonitor.systems: Competitive monitoring platform, ad intelligence, social listening, web scraping.
competitiveMonitor.keyData: Competitor ad spend estimates, creative samples, messaging themes, promotional calendar, SOV data.
competitiveMonitor.kpis: Time-to-detect competitor moves, counter-campaign response time, SOV trend.

abTestAutomation.name: A/B Test Automation Agent
abTestAutomation.purpose: Design experiments, monitor statistical significance, auto-promote winners, and manage test velocity across channels.
abTestAutomation.tasks: Recommend test hypotheses, design experiment variants, monitor statistical significance in real-time, auto-promote winning variants, manage test calendar, archive learnings, prevent test conflicts.
abTestAutomation.triggers: New test launch, significance threshold reached, test calendar slot available, performance anomaly suggesting test opportunity.
abTestAutomation.systems: A/B testing platform, web analytics, CMS, marketing automation.
abTestAutomation.keyData: Active tests, variant performance, statistical significance, test history, conversion baselines.
abTestAutomation.kpis: Test velocity, win rate, incremental conversion from testing, time-to-significance.
abTestAutomation.hitl: Hybrid — auto-promotes clear winners, flags close calls for human decision

crmLifecycleOrch.name: CRM & Lifecycle Orchestrator
crmLifecycleOrch.purpose: Master orchestrator for VP CRM & Lifecycle Marketing — orchestrates sub-agents (Journey, Segmentation, Loyalty, NBA, Data Enrichment, Product Launch) for integrated lifecycle management.
crmLifecycleOrch.tasks: Coordinate lifecycle communication strategy, orchestrate journey and personalization sub-agents, manage cross-channel frequency governance, surface lifecycle KPIs for leadership.
crmLifecycleOrch.triggers: Lifecycle stage transition, campaign planning, frequency cap conflict, quarterly review.
crmLifecycleOrch.systems: Marketing Cloud, CRM, CDP, loyalty platform, decision engine.
crmLifecycleOrch.keyData: Lifecycle stage distribution, engagement metrics, journey performance, segment health, frequency status.
crmLifecycleOrch.kpis: Lifecycle revenue, engagement rates, opt-out rate, journey completion, NBO acceptance.

productLaunch.name: Product Launch Agent
productLaunch.purpose: Orchestrate multi-channel launch sequences for new devices, plans, and promotions — from teaser through post-launch nurture.
productLaunch.tasks: Coordinate launch timeline across channels (email, SMS, social, in-store, digital), manage teaser campaigns, trigger launch-day activations, monitor launch performance in real-time, adjust messaging based on early signals, manage post-launch nurture sequences.
productLaunch.triggers: Product launch calendar milestone, launch day, post-launch performance review.
productLaunch.systems: Marketing automation, CMS, social management, CRM, commerce, inventory.
productLaunch.keyData: Launch calendar, target segments, channel readiness, inventory availability, early performance signals.
productLaunch.kpis: Launch awareness, day-1 conversion, channel coordination score, post-launch adoption curve.
productLaunch.hitl: Hybrid — autonomous for execution, approval-based for mid-launch pivots

dataEnrichment.name: Customer Data Enrichment Agent
dataEnrichment.purpose: Continuously enrich customer profiles with behavioral signals, third-party data, intent signals, and interaction history.
dataEnrichment.tasks: Ingest behavioral events from app/web/store, append third-party demographic and firmographic data, detect intent signals (competitor site visits, upgrade research), maintain data freshness and accuracy, flag data quality issues.
dataEnrichment.triggers: New behavioral event, data quality threshold breach, third-party data refresh, enrichment schedule.
dataEnrichment.systems: CDP, CRM, data warehouse, third-party data providers, web analytics.
dataEnrichment.keyData: Customer behavioral events, third-party data feeds, intent signals, data quality scores, profile completeness.
dataEnrichment.kpis: Profile completeness rate, data freshness, enrichment coverage, downstream model accuracy improvement.

customer360.name: Customer 360 Agent
customer360.purpose: Compile and maintain a single unified customer view from CRM, billing, support, commerce, and usage data; surface it to all agents.
customer360.tasks: Reconcile customer identity across systems, merge duplicate profiles, maintain golden record, surface unified view to requesting agents, track data lineage, ensure consistency across touchpoints.
customer360.triggers: New customer event from any system, identity merge detected, data conflict, agent context request.
customer360.systems: Salesforce Data Cloud, CRM, billing, OMS, support, commerce, CDP.
customer360.keyData: All customer data points unified: profile, billing, products, interactions, usage, preferences, churn risk, LTV.
customer360.kpis: Identity resolution accuracy, golden record completeness, cross-system consistency, agent context delivery speed.
